Cosrx.philosophy: Ingredient-driven solutions for specific skin concerns. Clinically tested, dermatologist-formulated. Key actives: snail mucin, peptides, centella, BHA, niacinamide. 'Your skin, your answer' — personalized skincare, not one-size-fits-all.

CeraVe.philosophy: Developed with dermatologists. Three essential ceramides + MVE technology for time-released hydration. Restores skin barrier. Suitable for all skin types including eczema, acne, psoriasis. #1 dermatologist-recommended brand.
CeraVe.tone: Clinical authority, barrier-science focused, gentle and trustworthy

Some By Mi.philosophy: 30 Days Miracle — visible results in 30 days. AHA/BHA/PHA triple-acid approach combined with natural extracts (tea tree, truecica, yuja niacin). Targets acne-prone and troubled skin with Korean herbal science.

innisfree.philosophy: Nature from Jeju Island — volcanic minerals, green tea, orchid extracts sourced from Korea's pristine Jeju. Green science combining nature + technology. Eco-friendly packaging and sustainability commitment.
innisfree.tone: Natural, fresh, eco-conscious, Jeju island storytelling

The Ordinary.philosophy: Clinical formulations, honest pricing. Ingredient-first — each product features a hero active at effective concentration. No marketing fluff. Transparency in what each product does and doesn't do. Part of DECIEM 'The Abnormal Beauty Company'.

Neutrogena.philosophy: Dermatologist-recommended, science-backed. Clean formulations that work — no unnecessary additives. Known for gentle cleansers, oil-free moisturizers, and reliable SPF protection. Johnson & Johnson heritage.

SKIN1004.philosophy: Madagascar Centella Asiatica specialist — single-hero-ingredient focus. Pure centella from Madagascar for calming, healing, and strengthening sensitive skin. Minimal irritants, maximum efficacy.

Anua.philosophy: Heartleaf (Houttuynia Cordata) specialist — 77-80% concentration. Gentle enough for daily use, effective enough for troubled skin. Clean beauty with minimal unnecessary ingredients.

Medicube.philosophy: Medical-grade skincare meets beauty technology. PDRN (salmon DNA), collagen boosting devices, derma-level actives in consumer-friendly formats. Clinic results at home.

Beauty of Joseon.philosophy: Korean herbal medicine meets modern skincare — ginseng, rice, propolis, plum from traditional hanbang recipes. Glow Serum and Relief Sun are cult favorites. Heritage ingredients, modern formulation.
Beauty of Joseon.tone: Traditional Korean heritage, hanbang wisdom, elegant simplicity

Purito Seoul.philosophy: Clean beauty with EWG Green-grade ingredients. Centella and green-level safe formulations. Transparent ingredient sourcing. Minimalist but effective — fewer ingredients, better results.

Heimish.philosophy: Home-like comfort skincare. Gentle Bulgarian rose, chamomile, and herbal extracts for soothing daily care. Famous for All Clean Balm — effortless double cleansing.

The Derma Co.philosophy: Dermatologist-backed active skincare at accessible prices. High-concentration actives (retinol, salicylic acid, vitamin C, niacinamide) with clinical efficacy. Science-first approach for Indian/South Asian skin.

Dabo.philosophy: Affordable Korean beauty basics — accessible skincare for everyday use. Wide range covering sun protection, cleansing, moisturizing. Value-oriented without compromising on Korean formulation quality.

APLB.philosophy: High-performance Korean skincare with premium ingredients at fair prices. Focus on peptides, stem cells, and advanced actives for anti-aging and skin renewal.

Maybelline.philosophy: Maybe she's born with it, maybe it's Maybelline. Accessible makeup artistry for everyone. Bold color, reliable formulas, trend-setting looks at drugstore prices.

The Body Shop.philosophy: Ethically sourced, cruelty-free, community trade ingredients. Nature-inspired formulations with shea butter, tea tree, vitamin E. Activism and beauty together.

_default.philosophy: Quality skincare/beauty formulation with focus on efficacy and safety.
